report_name: SANS Survey: Government Cybersecurity Crippled by Funding Gaps and Staff Shortages

identities.name: SANS Institute
identities.description: Author of the '2026 Cybersecurity Readiness in Government Survey' which found that government cybersecurity programs are underfunded and understaffed.

identities.name: Government Agencies
identities.description: The subject of the SANS Institute survey, including federal, state, and local level agencies, which are reported to be underfunded and understaffed in their cybersecurity programs.
